text.title: max-turns-circuit-breaker Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for max-turns-circuit-breaker as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Raising max_turns to 100+ to "stop hitting the cap".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hides the underlying loop bug (bad tool, missing termination signal) and multiplies wasted spend. Fix the loop, do not extend the leash.

failure-mode.description: Catching MaxTurnsExceeded and silently returning empty string.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: User sees a blank reply, ops loses the trace. Always emit either a recovery summary or a typed error with the partial trajectory id.
